heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 292p Authorization of appropriations
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 720 of act , was classified to prior to the general revision of this subchapter by .July 1, 1944section 293 of this titlePub. L. 102–408

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: For fiscal year 1993 and subsequent fiscal years, there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for the adequacy of the student loan insurance account under this subpart and for the purpose of administering this subpart.

children.heading: Availability of sums
children.label: b Availability of sums
children.text: Sums appropriated under subsection (a) shall remain available until expended.
